При вырубании вас: Замешательство 10 обидчику.
translation.en_description: Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.
When downed, inflict Confusion 10 on the unit that downed you.
